description: Fix code quality issues from semantic review: timer race in HabitatWorld, signature mismatch for onOpenHabitat, and unconditional Ctrl+H handler
steps: Fix timer race in HabitatWorld.jsx: store setTimeout IDs in refs, clear them at the top of both openBox and closeBox, and clean up on unmount with useEffect.
Fix signature mismatch: remove originFromEvent(e) argument from onOpenHabitat call in Launchpad.jsx since habitat mode does not use origin for transitions.
Fix Ctrl+H firing unconditionally: guard the handler in App.jsx with a check that app, play, and gate are not active.
acceptance_criteria: Timer IDs are stored in refs and cleared before new timers are set in openBox/closeBox
A useEffect cleanup clears any pending timers on unmount
onOpenHabitat in Launchpad.jsx is called without arguments
Ctrl+H handler does not toggle habitat mode when app, play, or gate overlays are active
